You are sweeping the RBK kit subtree as part of a moorings-cutover cleanup pace. Working directory: /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster

GOAL: In `Tools/rbk/**/*.sh` AND `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/**/*.rs`, eliminate (a) all transitional `RBBC_*` references and (b) all raw `.buk` / `.rbk` / `rbev-vessels` string literals, routing every reference through a named RBCC constant from `Tools/rbk/rbcc_Constants.sh`.

DO NOT TOUCH `Tools/buk/` — a separate agent owns that tree. DO NOT edit `Tools/rbk/rbcc_Constants.sh` itself (the alias-definition site; the parent will retire aliases there afterward). DO NOT COMMIT — just make the edits; the parent handles the commit.

RBBC → RBCC translation table:
- `RBBC_dot_dir`   → `RBCC_moorings_dir`
- `RBBC_rbrr_file` → `RBCC_rbrr_file`
- `RBBC_rbrd_file` → `RBCC_rbrd_file`
- `RBBC_rbrm_file` → `RBCC_rbrm_file`
- `RBBC_rbrp_file` → `RBCC_rbrp_file`
- `RBBC_kit_subdir` (defined as ="rbk") → NO direct RBCC equivalent. Inspect each use. If it composes a path with the kit dir, prefer `RBCC_KIT_DIR` (absolute self-locating dir) where appropriate, or mint a new `RBCC_kit_subdir="rbk"` constant in your head and FLAG it for the parent to add — do NOT add it to rbcc_Constants.sh yourself. Report these sites explicitly.

Available RBCC constants (from rbcc_Constants.sh — read it first to confirm):
RBCC_KIT_DIR (absolute kit dir), RBCC_moorings_dir="rbmm_moorings", RBCC_launchers_subdir="rbml_launchers", RBCC_users_subdir="rbmu_users", RBCC_nodes_subdir="rbmn_nodes", RBCC_vessels_subdir="rbmv_vessels", RBCC_rbrr_file, RBCC_rbrp_file, RBCC_rbrm_file, RBCC_rbrd_file, plus role/verb/fact constants.

SELECTION DISCIPLINE (from the pace docket):
- Literal `.buk/X` where X is a stable subpath → compose `"${RBCC_moorings_dir}/X"`.
- Literal `.buk/X` where X is a kit identifier already constant-bound → compose via both constants, e.g. `"${RBCC_moorings_dir}/${RBCC_vessels_subdir}"`.
- If a literal recurs 3+ times for the same concept → flag that a new constant should be minted (report it; don't add to rbcc_Constants.sh yourself).
- For literals appearing only in COMMENTS or operator-facing message strings (buc_log_args/buc_info/buc_step/buc_die text), correctness matters: if the path moved (`.buk/` → `rbmm_moorings/`), the message is now STALE. Fix the displayed path to be correct. Use a constant where one fits; if it's pure prose in a comment, updating the literal text to the new path is acceptable. Use judgment and report what you did.

RUST NOTE: `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/rbtdrf_fast.rs` embeds shell strings referencing kit vars — it's the canonical example. Check all `.rs` files under `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/` for embedded `RBBC_`/literal references.

KNOWN STARTING SITES (verify with fresh greps — counts may shift):
- `grep -rn 'RBBC_' Tools/rbk/` (~115 refs across many _cli.sh, rbob_bottle.sh, rbtd/, etc.)
- `grep -rEn '\.buk|\.rbk|rbev-vessels' Tools/rbk --include='*.sh' --include='*.rs'`
  Known: rbgc_Constants.sh:184 (comment), rbfc_FoundryCore.sh:180 (comment), rbndb_base.sh:23/130/154/233, vov_veiled/FUTURE/rbv_PodmanVM.sh:434 (comment)

Note: `rbev-vessels` as a literal is the OLD vessel dir name now `rbmv_vessels` (RBCC_vessels_subdir). Comments mentioning `rbev-sentry-deb-tether` as an EXAMPLE vessel NAME are fine — those are nameplate examples, not the dir. Distinguish carefully.

WRAP CRITERION: After edits, both of these return empty (or only documented exceptions) over your tree:
- `grep -rn 'RBBC_' Tools/rbk/ | grep -v rbcc_Constants.sh`
- `grep -rEn '\.buk|\.rbk|rbev-vessels' Tools/rbk --include='*.sh' --include='*.rs'`

DELIVERABLE: Make all edits, then run those two greps and report: (1) final grep results, (2) every site where you minted-or-want-a-new-constant or made a judgment call (especially RBBC_kit_subdir sites and comment/message-string corrections), (3) any genuinely-surviving references you could not resolve and why. Do NOT run the test suite — the parent does that. Do NOT commit.

- rbk-prep-release: Prepare release candidate for upstream delivery
- vvc-BREAK-LOCK: Force-break a stuck VVC lock after a crash.
- vvc-commit: Guarded git commit
- cma-prep-pr: Prepare branch for upstream PR contribution
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

25	ZRBCC_SOURCED=1

27	# Kit directory — source-time self-location. rbcc lives at the RBK kit root,
28	# so its own directory IS the kit dir. No launcher environment dependency;
29	# available the instant this file is sourced (BCG kit-self-location pattern,
30	# canon: rbtd/rbte_cli.sh).
31	readonly RBCC_KIT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
32	
33	# ── Moorings inventory constants ──────────────────────────────────────────
34	# New names holding FUTURE moorings-relative values. No kit code reads these
35	# yet — they are inventory for the filesystem move (value-flip in lockstep)
36	# and the subsequent literal sweep. Source-time literals, no kindle dependency.
37	RBCC_moorings_dir="rbmm_moorings"
38	RBCC_launchers_subdir="rbml_launchers"
39	RBCC_users_subdir="rbmu_users"
40	RBCC_nodes_subdir="rbmn_nodes"

43	RBCC_rbrp_file="${RBCC_moorings_dir}/rbrp.env"
44	RBCC_rbrm_file="${RBCC_moorings_dir}/rbrm.env"
45	RBCC_rbrd_file="${RBCC_moorings_dir}/rbrd.env"
46	
47	# ── RBBC transitional aliases ─────────────────────────────────────────────
48	# RBBC (formerly a separate bootstrap file) absorbed into RBCC. Non-furnish
49	# kit code (rbob_bottle, rblm_cli, rbh0/*, etc.) and the config-source lines in
50	# the furnishes read these names. RBBC_dot_dir now resolves to the moorings
51	# layout (flipped at the filesystem-move pace); the composed *_file aliases
52	# follow. A later literal-sweep pace retires the names in favor of RBCC_*.
53	RBBC_kit_subdir="rbk"
54	RBBC_dot_dir="rbmm_moorings"
55	RBBC_rbrr_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrr.env"
56	RBBC_rbrd_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrd.env"
57	RBBC_rbrm_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrm.env"
58	RBBC_rbrp_file="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrp.env"
59	
60	# Literal constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
61	RBCC_rbrs_file="../station-files/rbrs.env"
62	RBCC_rbrn_file="rbrn.env"
63	RBCC_rbra_file="rbra.env"
64	RBCC_rbro_file="rbro.env"

66	RBCC_role_retriever="retriever"
67	RBCC_role_director="director"
68	RBCC_role_payor="payor"
69	RBCC_role_assay="assay"
70	RBCC_role_mason="mason"
71	RBCC_onboarding_nameplate="tadmor"
72	
73	# Cult-verb tinder — used by SA-management surface (invest/divest/roster) and
74	# composed into fact-extension constants below.
75	RBCC_verb_invest="invest"
76	RBCC_verb_divest="divest"
77	RBCC_verb_roster="roster"
78	
79	# Fact-file extension tinder — multi-fact registry for buf_write_fact_multi.
80	# Producers emit "<basename>.<extension>" via filesystem-as-data-bus pattern;
81	# consumers walk fact files in BURD_OUTPUT_DIR / BURD_TEMP_DIR keyed on extension.
82	# Roster extensions composed from earlier tinder (BCG tinder-on-tinder).
83	RBCC_fact_ext_depot="depot"

85	RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_retriever}"
86	RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director="${RBCC_verb_roster}-${RBCC_role_director}"
87	RBCC_fact_ext_audit_hallmark="audit-hallmark"

91

93	  test -z "${ZRBCC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbcc already kindled"
94	
95	  # Curl timeout bounds — all actionable curl sites use these
96	  readonly RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC=10
97	  readonly RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC=60
98	
99	  readonly ZRBCC_KINDLED=1

18	#
19	# RBFH CLI - Recipe Bottle Foundry Hygiene command-line interface
20	#
21	# Surfaces the Dockerfile FROM-line constraint enforced by the rbfh
22	# library module so that theurge fixtures (and operators) can drive
23	# the contract from outside the kludge/conjure code paths.
24	#
25	# Commands:
26	#   check         Check a Dockerfile path for FROM-line hygiene
27	#   check_vessel  Check a vessel's RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE for hygiene
28	
29	set -euo pipefail
30	
31	source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
32	
33	######################################################################
34	# CLI Commands
35	
36	rbfh_check() {
37	  zrbfh_sentinel
38	
39	  buc_doc_brief "Check a Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"
40	  buc_doc_param "dockerfile" "Path to the Dockerfile to check"
41	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
42	
43	  local -r z_path="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
44	  test -n "${z_path}" || buc_die "Dockerfile path required (free-form path argument)"
45	
46	  buc_step "RBFH Check: ${z_path}"
47	  rbfh_dockerfile_check "${z_path}"
48	  buc_success "Dockerfile passes hygiene contract: ${z_path}"
49	}
50	
51	rbfh_check_vessel() {
52	  zrbfh_sentinel
53	  zrbfc_sentinel
54	
55	  buc_doc_brief "Check a vessel's conjure Dockerfile against the FROM-line hygiene contract"
56	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
57	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
58	
59	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path) — lists-and-dies on missing/invalid
60	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"
61	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
62	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
63	
64	  # Source the vessel's rbrv.env to pick up RBRV_VESSEL_MODE and RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE
65	  source "${z_vessel_dir}/rbrv.env" || buc_die "Failed to source vessel rbrv.env: ${z_vessel_dir}/rbrv.env"
66	
67	  # Hygiene is a property of the FROM line; non-conjure vessels have no
68	  # local Dockerfile, so the contract is vacuously satisfied. Exit silently
69	  # so callers iterating the whole fleet need not pre-filter by mode.
70	  if test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-}" != "conjure"; then
71	    buc_info "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL:-${z_vessel_dir}}' is mode '${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE:-<unset>}' — no Dockerfile to check"
72	    return 0
73	  fi
74	
75	  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" \
76	    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL:-${z_vessel_dir}}' has no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE"
77	
78	  buc_step "RBFH Check Vessel: ${RBRV_SIGIL:-${z_vessel_dir}} → ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
79	  rbfh_dockerfile_check "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
80	  buc_success "Vessel Dockerfile passes hygiene contract: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
81	}

19	# RBOB - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle
20	# Container lifecycle management via Docker Compose
21	#
22	# Requires: buc_command.sh sourced
23	# Requires: rbrn_regime.sh sourced
24	# Requires: rbrr_regime.sh sourced
25	# Requires: rbrd_regime.sh sourced
26	
27	set -euo pipefail
28	
29	# Multiple inclusion detection
30	test -z "${ZRBOB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
31	ZRBOB_SOURCED=1
32	
33	
34	######################################################################
35	# Compose-env Validation
36	
37	# Validate that compose-consumed RBRN fields contain no quotes or ${VAR} references.
38	# Compose --env-file does not strip quotes (they become part of the value) and
39	# interpolates ${VAR} references (causing unintended expansion). Fields not consumed
40	# by compose (e.g., RBRN_DESCRIPTION) are exempt.
41	zrbob_validate_compose_env() {
42	  # Explicit list of compose-consumed field names (the nameplate↔compose contract)
43	  local z_compose_fields="
44	    RBRN_MONIKER
45	    RBRN_RUNTIME
46	    RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL
47	    RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL
48	    RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK
49	    RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK
50	    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
51	    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
52	    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
53	    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
54	    RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
55	    RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
56	    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
57	    RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
58	    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
59	    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
60	    RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
61	    RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
62	  "
63	
64	  local z_field=""
65	  for z_field in ${z_compose_fields}; do
66	    local z_value="${!z_field:-}"
67	    # Check for quotes (compose does not strip them)
68	    case "${z_value}" in
69	      *\"*|*\'*)
70	        buc_die "Compose compatibility: ${z_field} contains quotes — compose --env-file does not strip quotes, they become part of the value"
71	        ;;
72	    esac
73	    # Check for ${VAR} references (compose interpolates them)
74	    case "${z_value}" in
75	      *'${'*)
76	        buc_die "Compose compatibility: ${z_field} contains \${VAR} reference — compose --env-file interpolates these, causing unintended expansion"
77	        ;;
78	    esac
79	  done
80	}
81	
82	######################################################################
83	# Kindle and Sentinel
84	
85	zrbob_kindle() {
86	  test -z "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob already kindled"
87	
88	  # Verify RBRN regime is kindled (provides nameplate config)
89	  zrbrn_sentinel
90	
91	  # Validate compose-consumed fields before proceeding
92	  zrbob_validate_compose_env
93	
94	  # Verify RBRR regime is kindled (provides repo config like DNS_SERVER)
95	  zrbrr_sentinel
96	
97	  # Runtime command (docker or podman)
98	  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
99	    docker) readonly ZRBOB_RUNTIME="docker" ;;
100	    podman) readonly ZRBOB_RUNTIME="podman" ;;
101	    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRN_RUNTIME: ${RBRN_RUNTIME}" ;;
102	  esac
103	
104	  # Compose project identity for this nameplate. The runtime-prefixed moniker
105	  # is the authoritative project name compose labels containers and networks
106	  # under; every -p invocation and every container/network name derives from it.
107	  readonly ZRBOB_PROJECT="${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}${RBRN_MONIKER}"
108	
109	  # Container names (for connect and info commands)
110	  readonly ZRBOB_SENTRY="${ZRBOB_PROJECT}-sentry"
111	  readonly ZRBOB_PENTACLE="${ZRBOB_PROJECT}-pentacle"
112	  readonly ZRBOB_BOTTLE="${ZRBOB_PROJECT}-bottle"
113	
114	  # Network name (compose names as {project}_{network}; used by observe and info)
115	  readonly ZRBOB_NETWORK="${ZRBOB_PROJECT}_enclave"
116	
117	  # Base compose file and the compose-quoting probe are kit machinery, not
118	  # consumer config — they live with the kit (RBCC_KIT_DIR), not in moorings.
119	  readonly ZRBOB_COMPOSE_BASE="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/rbob_compose.yml"
120	  test -f "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_BASE}" || buc_die "Base compose file not found: ${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_BASE}"
121	
122	  readonly ZRBOB_COMPOSE_FRAGMENT="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBRN_MONIKER}/rbnnh_compose.yml"
123	  # Fragment is optional — existence checked at compose invocation time
124	
125	  readonly ZRBOB_POST_CHARGE_HOOK="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBRN_MONIKER}/rbnnh_post_charge.sh"
126	  # Hook is optional — existence + executable bit checked at charge tail
127	
128	  # Env file paths (for compose --env-file: YAML interpolation + container env forwarding)
129	  readonly ZRBOB_ENV_RBRR="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrr.env"
130	  readonly ZRBOB_ENV_RBRD="${RBBC_dot_dir}/rbrd.env"
131	  readonly ZRBOB_ENV_RBJE="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/rbje_compose_probe.env"
132	  readonly ZRBOB_ENV_RBRN="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBRN_MONIKER}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
133	
134	  # RBDC env file — RBDC_* are bash-kindle constants invisible to compose
135	  # without an env-file bridge. Write the subset compose interpolates into
136	  # a temp file and feed it via --env-file.
137	  local z_rbdc_env="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbob_rbdc_compose.env"
138	  printf 'RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=%s\nRBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY=%s\n' \
139	    "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" > "${z_rbdc_env}" \
140	    || buc_die "Failed to write RBDC compose env file: ${z_rbdc_env}"
141	  readonly ZRBOB_ENV_RBDC="${z_rbdc_env}"
142	
143	
144	  # GAR image references (computed once, used by preflight and auto-summon)
145	  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
146	  readonly ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}"
147	  readonly ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}"
148	
149	  # GAR vouch references (local presence verified on every start)
150	  readonly ZRBOB_SENTRY_VOUCH="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK}"
151	  readonly ZRBOB_BOTTLE_VOUCH="${z_gar_base}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK}"
152	
153	  # Export RBRN/RBRR vars for compose environment: bare name forwarding.
154	  # Compose --env-file populates the compose environment for both YAML interpolation
155	  # and bare name forwarding; explicit exports provide defense-in-depth.
156	  export RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
157	  export RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK
158	  export RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
159	  export RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
160	  export RBRN_ENTRY_MODE
161	  export RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
162	  export RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
163	  export RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE
164	  export RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
165	  export RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE
166	  export RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
167	  export RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
168	  export RBRR_DNS_SERVER
169	  export RBRR_BOTTLE_WORKSPACE
170	
171	  # Host UID/GID for bind-mount ownership alignment.
172	  # The person running charge IS the host identity — no configuration needed.
173	  local z_uid_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbob_host_uid"
174	  local z_gid_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbob_host_gid"
175	  id -u > "${z_uid_file}" || buc_die "Failed to determine host UID"
176	  id -g > "${z_gid_file}" || buc_die "Failed to determine host GID"
177	  local z_host_uid=""
178	  z_host_uid=$(<"${z_uid_file}")
179	  local z_host_gid=""
180	  z_host_gid=$(<"${z_gid_file}")
181	  export RBOB_HOST_UID="${z_host_uid}"
182	  export RBOB_HOST_GID="${z_host_gid}"
183	
184	  # Load bottle vessel user for compose and SSH (optional — empty means image default)
185	  local z_bottle_rbrv="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}/rbrv.env"
186	  local z_bottle_user=""
187	  if test -f "${z_bottle_rbrv}"; then
188	    z_bottle_user=$(grep '^RBRV_USER=' "${z_bottle_rbrv}" | head -1 | cut -d= -f2) || true
189	  fi
190	  readonly ZRBOB_BOTTLE_USER="${z_bottle_user}"
191	  export RBRV_USER="${z_bottle_user}"
192	
193	  readonly ZRBOB_DRIVE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbob_drive_"
194	
195	  readonly ZRBOB_KINDLED=1
196	}
197	
198	zrbob_sentinel() {
199	  test "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbob not kindled - call zrbob_kindle first"
200	}
201	
202	######################################################################
203	# Compose Command Helper
204	
205	# Build and execute a compose command with standard args
206	# Usage: zrbob_compose <compose_subcommand> [args...]
207	zrbob_compose() {
208	  zrbob_sentinel
209	
210	  local z_args=()
211	  z_args+=("compose")
212	  # Pin the project directory to the moorings (consumer-config) root. Compose
213	  # otherwise derives it from the first -f file's location — and the base
214	  # compose now lives with the kit (Tools/rbk), not in moorings. Nameplate
215	  # fragment (rbnnh_compose.yml) relative paths — env_file, volume mounts —
216	  # are authored relative to this root, so it must be set explicitly. CLI
217	  # --env-file paths resolve against CWD (repo root) and are unaffected.
218	  z_args+=("--project-directory" "${RBBC_dot_dir}")
219	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRR}")
220	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRD}")
221	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBDC}")
222	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBJE}")
223	  z_args+=("--env-file" "${ZRBOB_ENV_RBRN}")
224	  z_args+=("-f" "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_BASE}")
225	
226	  # Include nameplate fragment if it exists
227	  if test -f "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_FRAGMENT}"; then
228	    z_args+=("-f" "${ZRBOB_COMPOSE_FRAGMENT}")
229	  fi
230	
231	  z_args+=("-p" "${ZRBOB_PROJECT}")
232	  z_args+=("$@")
233	
234	  buc_log_args "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} ${z_args[*]}"
235	  "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}" "${z_args[@]}"
236	}
237	
238	######################################################################
239	# Auto-Summon Helpers
240	
241	# Discriminate kludge hallmarks (local-only, no GAR presence) from conjure /
242	# bind / graft hallmarks. Used by charge preflight to redirect the diagnostic
243	# away from the summon path, which is guaranteed to fail for kludge stamps.
244	zrbob_hallmark_is_kludge() {
245	  case "${1}" in
246	    "${RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE}"*) return 0 ;;
247	    *) return 1 ;;
248	  esac
249	}

20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
24	
25	######################################################################
26	# Command: zero - Zero regime to blank template for release
27	
28	rblm_zero() {
29	  buc_doc_brief "Zero regime to blank template for release qualification"
30	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
31	
32	  local -r z_rbrr="${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
33	  local -r z_rbrd="${RBBC_rbrd_file}"
34	  test -f "${z_rbrr}" || buc_die "RBRR file not found: ${z_rbrr}"
35	  test -f "${z_rbrd}" || buc_die "RBRD file not found: ${z_rbrd}"
36	
37	  # Pre-checks: working tree clean and HEAD pushed.
38	  # Marshal-zero auto-commits its mutations; both invariants must hold to keep
39	  # the resulting commit purely the marshal-zero state.
40	  mkdir -p "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create temp directory"
41	  local -r z_status_temp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rblm_zero_status.txt"
42	  local -r z_upstream_temp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rblm_zero_upstream.txt"
43	  local -r z_unpushed_temp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rblm_zero_unpushed.txt"
44	
45	  git status --porcelain > "${z_status_temp}" || buc_die "git status failed"
46	  test ! -s "${z_status_temp}" || buc_die "Working tree not clean — commit or discard before marshal-zero. See: ${z_status_temp}"
47	
48	  if ! git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name '@{u}' > "${z_upstream_temp}" 2>&1; then
49	    buc_die "Current branch has no upstream — set tracking and push before marshal-zero. See: ${z_upstream_temp}"
50	  fi
51	
52	  git rev-list '@{u}..HEAD' > "${z_unpushed_temp}" || buc_die "git rev-list failed"
53	  test ! -s "${z_unpushed_temp}" || buc_die "HEAD has unpushed commits — push before marshal-zero. See: ${z_unpushed_temp}"
54	
55	  # Discover secrets dir and vessel dir for pre-confirmation inventory
56	  local z_secrets_dir=""
57	  local z_vessel_dir=""
58	  local z_secrets_line=""
59	  while IFS= read -r z_secrets_line || test -n "${z_secrets_line}"; do
60	    case "${z_secrets_line}" in
61	      RBRR_SECRETS_DIR=*) z_secrets_dir="${z_secrets_line#RBRR_SECRETS_DIR=}" ;;
62	      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR=*)  z_vessel_dir="${z_secrets_line#RBRR_VESSEL_DIR=}"  ;;
63	    esac
64	  done < "${z_rbrr}"
65	
66	  buh_section "Marshal Zero"
67	  buh_line "  Targets: ${z_rbrr}"
68	  buh_line "           ${z_rbrd}"
69	  buh_e
70	  buh_line "  RBRR fields blanked (zeroed to onboarding start):"
71	  buh_line "    RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX"
72	  buh_e
73	  buh_line "  RBRR fields pre-filled to defaults:"
74	  buh_line "    RBRR_DNS_SERVER, RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT,"
75	  buh_line "    RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS,"
76	  buh_line "    RBRR_VESSEL_DIR, RBRR_SECRETS_DIR"
77	  buh_e
78	  buh_line "  RBRD fields blanked (depot identity — operator decision):"
79	  buh_line "    RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER"
80	  buh_e
81	  buh_line "  RBRD fields pre-filled to defaults:"
82	  buh_line "    RBRD_GCP_REGION, RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE"
83	  buh_e
84	  buh_line "  Depot credentials DELETED (tied to prior depot):"
85	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
86	    local z_preview=""
87	    local z_any_cred=0
88	    for z_preview in "${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_assay}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; do
89	      if test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${z_preview}"; then
90	        buh_line "    ${z_secrets_dir}/${z_preview}"
91	        z_any_cred=1
92	      fi
93	    done
94	    test "${z_any_cred}" = "1" || buh_line "    (none present)"
95	  else
96	    buh_line "    (secrets dir not configured)"
97	  fi
98	  buh_e
99	  buh_line "  Vessel hallmarks BLANKED (stale after depot change):"
100	  local z_np_preview=""
101	  local z_any_np=0
102	  for z_np_preview in "${RBBC_dot_dir}"/*/rbrn.env; do
103	    test -f "${z_np_preview}" || continue
104	    buh_line "    ${z_np_preview}"
105	    z_any_np=1
106	  done
107	  test "${z_any_np}" = "1" || buh_line "    (no nameplates found)"
108	  buh_e
109	  buh_line "  Vessel regime fields BLANKED (depot-scoped, stale after depot change):"
110	  buh_line "    RBRV_RELIQUARY, RBRV_IMAGE_*_ANCHOR in all rbrv.env"
111	  if test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" && test -d "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
112	    local z_vr_preview=""
113	    local z_any_vr=0
114	    for z_vr_preview in "${z_vessel_dir}"/*/rbrv.env; do
115	      test -f "${z_vr_preview}" || continue
116	      buh_line "    ${z_vr_preview}"
117	      z_any_vr=1
118	    done
119	    test "${z_any_vr}" = "1" || buh_line "    (no vessel regimes found)"
120	  else
121	    buh_line "    (vessel dir not configured or missing)"
122	  fi
123	  buh_e
124	  buh_line "  Preserved (payor-scoped, survives depot change):"
125	  buh_line "    ${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_payor}/${RBCC_rbro_file}"
126	  buh_e
127	  buh_line "  On completion, marshal-zero auto-commits the in-tree mutations."
128	  buh_e
129	  buc_require "Proceed with marshal zero?" "zero"
130	
131	  local -r z_tmp="${z_rbrr}.tmp"
132	  local z_line=""
133	  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
134	    case "${z_line}" in
135	      # Pre-selected defaults
136	      RBRR_DNS_SERVER=*)                    printf '%s\n' "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=8.8.8.8"                     ;;
137	      RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT=*)                   printf '%s\n' "RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT=2700s"                      ;;
138	      RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS=*)     printf '%s\n' "RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS=3"            ;;
139	      RBRR_VESSEL_DIR=*)                    printf '%s\n' "RBRR_VESSEL_DIR=${RBCC_moorings_dir}/${RBCC_vessels_subdir}" ;;
140	      RBRR_SECRETS_DIR=*)                   printf '%s\n' "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR=../station-files/secrets"   ;;
141	      # Site-specific fields blanked
142	      RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX=*)                printf '%s\n' "RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX="                        ;;
143	      # Everything else passes through (comments, shebang, blanks)
144	      *)                                    printf '%s\n' "${z_line}"                                   ;;
145	    esac
146	  done < "${z_rbrr}" > "${z_tmp}" && mv "${z_tmp}" "${z_rbrr}"
147	
148	  # Apply equivalent transform to rbrd.env.
149	  local -r z_rbrd_tmp="${z_rbrd}.tmp"
150	  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
151	    case "${z_line}" in
152	      # Pre-selected defaults
153	      RBRD_GCP_REGION=*)                    printf '%s\n' "RBRD_GCP_REGION=us-central1"                 ;;
154	      RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE=*)              printf '%s\n' "RBRD_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE=e2-standard-2"         ;;
155	      # Site-specific fields blanked
156	      RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX=*)                  printf '%s\n' "RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX="                          ;;
157	      RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER=*)                 printf '%s\n' "RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER="                         ;;
158	      # Everything else passes through (comments, shebang, blanks)
159	      *)                                    printf '%s\n' "${z_line}"                                   ;;
160	    esac
161	  done < "${z_rbrd}" > "${z_rbrd_tmp}" && mv "${z_rbrd_tmp}" "${z_rbrd}"
162	
163	  # Remove depot-scoped RBRA files (governor, director, retriever).
164	  # z_secrets_dir already extracted above for pre-confirmation inventory.
165	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}"; then
166	    local z_rbra=""
167	    for z_rbra in "${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" "${RBCC_role_assay}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; do
168	      if test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${z_rbra}"; then
169	        rm "${z_secrets_dir}/${z_rbra}" || buc_die "Failed to remove: ${z_secrets_dir}/${z_rbra}"
170	        buh_line "  Removed stale depot credential: ${z_rbra}"
171	      fi
172	    done
173	  fi
174	
175	  # Blank hallmark values in all vessel nameplates.
176	  # Hallmarks reference images built against the prior depot — they
177	  # become stale after reset.  Blanking them causes the onboarding guide
178	  # to require conjure & vouch before declaring setup complete.
179	  local z_np=""
180	  local z_np_tmp=""
181	  for z_np in "${RBBC_dot_dir}"/*/rbrn.env; do
182	    test -f "${z_np}" || continue
183	    z_np_tmp="${z_np}.tmp"
184	    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
185	      case "${z_line}" in
186	        RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=*)  printf '%s\n' "RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK=" ;;
187	        RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK=*)  printf '%s\n' "RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK=" ;;
188	        *)                           printf '%s\n' "${z_line}"                  ;;
189	      esac
190	    done < "${z_np}" > "${z_np_tmp}" && mv "${z_np_tmp}" "${z_np}"
191	    buh_line "  Blanked hallmarks: ${z_np}"
192	  done
193	
194	  # Blank depot-scoped fields in all vessel regime files.
195	  # RBRV_RELIQUARY references a reliquary inscribed to the prior depot's GAR.
196	  # RBRV_IMAGE_*_ANCHOR references enshrined base images in the prior depot's GAR.
197	  # Both become stale after depot change — onboarding requires inscribe + enshrine.
198	  if test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" && test -d "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
199	    local z_vr=""
200	    local z_vr_tmp=""
201	    for z_vr in "${z_vessel_dir}"/*/rbrv.env; do
202	      test -f "${z_vr}" || continue
203	      z_vr_tmp="${z_vr}.tmp"
204	      while IFS= read -r z_line; do
205	        case "${z_line}" in
206	          RBRV_RELIQUARY=*)       printf '%s\n' "RBRV_RELIQUARY="       ;;
207	          RBRV_IMAGE_*_ANCHOR=*)  printf '%s\n' "${z_line%%=*}="        ;;
208	          *)                      printf '%s\n' "${z_line}"             ;;
209	        esac
210	      done < "${z_vr}" > "${z_vr_tmp}" && mv "${z_vr_tmp}" "${z_vr}"
211	      buh_line "  Blanked depot-scoped fields: ${z_vr}"
212	    done
213	  fi
214	
215	  buh_line "  Zero complete: ${z_rbrr}"
216	  buh_line "                 ${z_rbrd}"
217	  buh_e
218	
219	  # Auto-commit the in-tree mutations so post-zero state is captured as a single
220	  # commit. RBRA deletions (outside repo) are not staged.
221	  buc_step "Committing marshal-zero state"
222	  git add "${z_rbrr}" || buc_die "Failed to stage RBRR file"
223	  git add "${z_rbrd}" || buc_die "Failed to stage RBRD file"
224	
225	  local z_stage=""
226	  for z_stage in "${RBBC_dot_dir}"/*/rbrn.env; do
227	    test -f "${z_stage}" || continue
228	    git add "${z_stage}" || buc_die "Failed to stage: ${z_stage}"
229	  done
230	  if test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" && test -d "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
231	    for z_stage in "${z_vessel_dir}"/*/rbrv.env; do
232	      test -f "${z_stage}" || continue
233	      git add "${z_stage}" || buc_die "Failed to stage: ${z_stage}"
234	    done
235	  fi
236	
237	  if git diff --cached --quiet; then
238	    buh_line "  No changes to commit — already in marshal-zero state"
239	  else
240	    git commit -m "Marshal Zero — release qualification reset" || buc_die "Marshal-zero commit failed"
241	    buh_line "  Marshal-zero state committed"
242	  fi
243	  buh_e
244	
245	  buh_line "  Next: verify onboarding guide detects blank state:"
246	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ONBOARD_START_HERE}"
247	  buc_success "Regime zeroed to blank template"
248	}

251	# Command: proof - Create isolated clone for release ceremony testing
252	
253	rblm_proof() {
254	  buc_doc_brief "Create proof copy of repository for release ceremony testing"
255	  buc_doc_param "target_dir" "Absolute path to target directory (must not exist)"
256	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
257	
258	  local z_target_dir="${1:-}"
259	  test -n "${z_target_dir}" || buc_die "Target directory path is required"
260	
261	  # Validate absolute path
262	  case "${z_target_dir}" in
263	    /*) ;;
264	    *)  buc_die "Target directory must be an absolute path: ${z_target_dir}" ;;
265	  esac
266	
267	  # Must not exist
268	  test ! -e "${z_target_dir}" || buc_die "Target directory already exists: ${z_target_dir}"
269	
270	  # Get origin URL via temp file (BCG: temp file instead of command substitution)
271	  mkdir -p "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}" || buc_die "Failed to create temp directory"
272	  local -r z_origin_temp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rblm_origin_url.txt"
273	  git remote get-url origin > "${z_origin_temp}" || buc_die "Failed to get origin URL"
274	  local z_origin_url=$(<"${z_origin_temp}")
275	  test -n "${z_origin_url}" || buc_die "Origin URL is empty"
276	
277	  # Derive repo name from origin URL (BCG: parameter expansion, not basename)
278	  local z_repo_name="${z_origin_url##*/}"
279	  z_repo_name="${z_repo_name%.git}"
280	  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Could not derive repo name from origin: ${z_origin_url}"
281	
282	  # Resolve source station-files directory from BURD_STATION_FILE
283	  # BURD_STATION_FILE is absolute (set by launcher from BURC_STATION_FILE)
284	  local -r z_station_file_dir="${BURD_STATION_FILE%/*}"
285	  local -r z_source_station_dir="${z_station_file_dir}"
286	  local -r z_source_secrets="${z_station_file_dir}/secrets"
287	
288	  # Compute target paths
289	  local -r z_clone_dir="${z_target_dir}/${z_repo_name}"
290	  local -r z_target_station_dir="${z_target_dir}/station-files"
291	  local -r z_target_secrets="${z_target_station_dir}/secrets"
292	
293	  # Get OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM URL if configured
294	  local z_upstream_url=""
295	  local -r z_upstream_temp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rblm_upstream_url.txt"
296	  if git remote get-url OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM > "${z_upstream_temp}" 2>/dev/null; then
297	    z_upstream_url=$(<"${z_upstream_temp}")
298	  fi
299	
300	  # Present plan
301	  buh_section "Marshal Proof"
302	  buh_line "  Target directory:     ${z_target_dir}"
303	  buh_line "  Clone subdirectory:   ${z_clone_dir}"
304	  buh_line "  Station files:        ${z_target_station_dir}"
305	  buh_line "  Repo name:            ${z_repo_name}"
306	  buh_e
307	  buh_line "  Source station dir:   ${z_source_station_dir}"
308	  buh_line "  Source secrets:       ${z_source_secrets}"
309	  buh_e
310	  buh_line "  Clone origin:         ${z_origin_url}"
311	  if test -n "${z_upstream_url}"; then
312	    buh_line "  OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM: ${z_upstream_url}"
313	  else
314	    buh_line "  OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM: (not configured)"
315	  fi
316	  buh_e
317	
318	  # Create target directory
319	  buc_step "Creating target directory"
320	  mkdir "${z_target_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create target directory: ${z_target_dir}"
321	
322	  # Clone repository
323	  buc_step "Cloning repository to ${z_clone_dir}"
324	  git clone . "${z_clone_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to clone repository"
325	
326	  # Set origin in clone to real origin (not local path from git clone .)
327	  buc_step "Configuring remotes in clone"
328	  git -C "${z_clone_dir}" remote set-url origin "${z_origin_url}" || buc_die "Failed to set origin URL in clone"
329	
330	  # Set OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM if configured on source
331	  if test -n "${z_upstream_url}"; then
332	    if git -C "${z_clone_dir}" remote get-url OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM >/dev/null 2>&1; then
333	      git -C "${z_clone_dir}" remote set-url OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM "${z_upstream_url}" || buc_die "Failed to set OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM in clone"
334	    else
335	      git -C "${z_clone_dir}" remote add OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM "${z_upstream_url}" || buc_die "Failed to add OPEN_SOURCE_UPSTREAM to clone"
336	    fi
337	  fi
338	
339	  # Copy station files (all .env files from source station directory)
340	  buc_step "Copying station files"
341	  mkdir -p "${z_target_secrets}" || buc_die "Failed to create secrets directory"
342	
343	  local z_env_file=""
344	  local z_env_name=""
345	  for z_env_file in "${z_source_station_dir}"/*.env; do
346	    test -f "${z_env_file}" || continue
347	    z_env_name="${z_env_file##*/}"
348	    cp "${z_env_file}" "${z_target_station_dir}/${z_env_name}" || buc_die "Failed to copy: ${z_env_name}"
349	    buh_line "  Copied: ${z_env_name}"
350	  done
351	
352	  # Copy secrets (credential files)
353	  if test -d "${z_source_secrets}"; then
354	    local z_cred=""
355	    local z_cred_name=""
356	    local z_any_copied=0
357	    for z_cred in "${z_source_secrets}"/*.env; do
358	      test -f "${z_cred}" || continue
359	      z_cred_name="${z_cred##*/}"
360	      cp "${z_cred}" "${z_target_secrets}/${z_cred_name}" || buc_die "Failed to copy credential: ${z_cred_name}"
361	      chmod 600 "${z_target_secrets}/${z_cred_name}" || buc_die "Failed to set permissions on: ${z_cred_name}"
362	      buh_line "  Copied: secrets/${z_cred_name}"
363	      z_any_copied=1
364	    done
365	    test "${z_any_copied}" = "1" || buh_line "  No credential files found in: ${z_source_secrets}"
366	  else
367	    buh_line "  Warning: source secrets directory not found: ${z_source_secrets}"
368	  fi
369	
370	  buh_e
371	  buh_line "  Proof complete: ${z_clone_dir}"
372	  buh_e
373	  buh_line "  To use the duplicate, start Claude Code from:"
374	  buh_line "    ${z_clone_dir}"
375	  buc_success "Proof copy created at ${z_target_dir}"
376	}

20	# Recipe Bottle Depot Regime Bespoke - Tripwire helpers
21	#
22	# Implements the depot-immutable tripwire. At end of successful levy
23	# the Payor inscribes a FROM-scratch image carrying .rbk/rbrd.env to
24	# GAR at rbi_df/rbrd:tripwire. Every cloud-submitting command pulls
25	# that image and exact-byte-diffs the file before submitting, so any
26	# post-levy hand-edit of rbrd.env dies loudly instead of silently
27	# differing from the depot's worker-pool quotas, region, and identity.
28	#
29	# Public functions:
30	#   rbrd_inscribe <bearer_token>   — host-side push at end of levy
31	#   rbrd_check    <bearer_token>   — pre-submit existence + byte-diff
32	#
33	# Module convention: rbn{R}{X}_ where R=d (depot regime) and X=b
34	# (bespoke implementation). See CLAUDE.md "Prefix Naming Discipline".
35	
36	set -euo pipefail
37	
38	# Multiple inclusion detection
39	test -z "${ZRBNDB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbndb multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
40	ZRBNDB_SOURCED=1
41	
42	######################################################################
43	# Internal Functions (zrbndb_*)
44	
45	zrbndb_kindle() {
46	  test -z "${ZRBNDB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbndb already kindled"
47	
48	  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
49	  zrbgc_sentinel
50	  zrbgl_sentinel
51	  zrbrd_sentinel
52	  zrbdc_sentinel
53	
54	  # Tripwire image FQN composed once at kindle time from depot's GAR
55	  # coordinates + the rbi_df depot-facts namespace.
56	  # Shape: <region>-docker.pkg.dev/<depot-project>/<gar-repo>/rbi_df/rbrd:tripwire
57	  readonly ZRBNDB_REGISTRY_HOST="${RBRD_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
58	  readonly ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE="${ZRBNDB_REGISTRY_HOST}/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBGL_DEPOT_FACTS_ROOT}/rbrd:tripwire"
59	
60	  # Per-command temp prefixes (forensic-preserving — files persist after run)
61	  readonly ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbndb_inscribe_"
62	  readonly ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbndb_check_"
63	
64	  readonly ZRBNDB_KINDLED=1
65	}
66	
67	zrbndb_sentinel() {
68	  test "${ZRBNDB_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbndb not kindled - call zrbndb_kindle first"
69	}
70	
71	# Authenticate the host docker client to the depot's GAR registry
72	# using a bearer token. Idempotent — repeated calls refresh credential.
73	# Args: bearer_token stderr_file
74	zrbndb_docker_login() {
75	  zrbndb_sentinel
76	
77	  local -r z_token="${1}"
78	  local -r z_stderr_file="${2}"
79	
80	  printf '%s' "${z_token}" \
81	    | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "${ZRBNDB_REGISTRY_HOST}" \
82	        > /dev/null 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
83	    || buc_die "Docker login to ${ZRBNDB_REGISTRY_HOST} failed — see ${z_stderr_file}"
84	}
85	
86	######################################################################
87	# External Functions (rbrd_*)
88	
89	# Inscribe the tripwire image at end of successful levy.
90	# Pre-push existence guard: image present → fatal (depot already
91	# inscribed; must be unmade and relevied to refresh).
92	# Token sources (in order): positional $1, then BUZ_FOLIO (tabtarget
93	# param1 channel). The former is the consuming-CLI path (caller has a
94	# token in scope); the latter is the rbw-rdi tabtarget path.
95	rbrd_inscribe() {
96	  zrbndb_sentinel
97	
98	  buc_doc_brief "Inscribe RBRD tripwire image to GAR (host-side, at end of levy)"
99	  buc_doc_param "bearer_token" "OAuth access token with GAR write (Payor)"
100	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
101	
102	  local -r z_token="${1:-${BUZ_FOLIO:-}}"
103	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbrd_inscribe: bearer token required (positional arg or BUZ_FOLIO)"
104	
105	  local -r z_login_stderr="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}login_stderr.txt"
106	  local -r z_manifest_stderr="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}manifest_stderr.txt"
107	  local -r z_build_dir="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}build"
108	  local -r z_dockerfile="${z_build_dir}/Dockerfile"
109	  local -r z_rbrd_copy="${z_build_dir}/rbrd.env"
110	  local -r z_build_stdout="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}build_stdout.txt"
111	  local -r z_build_stderr="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}build_stderr.txt"
112	  local -r z_push_stdout="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}push_stdout.txt"
113	  local -r z_push_stderr="${ZRBNDB_INSCRIBE_PREFIX}push_stderr.txt"
114	
115	  buc_step "Inscribe RBRD tripwire image to GAR"
116	  buc_log_args "Target: ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}"
117	
118	  zrbndb_docker_login "${z_token}" "${z_login_stderr}"
119	
120	  buc_log_args "Pre-push existence guard via docker manifest inspect"
121	  if docker manifest inspect "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" > /dev/null 2>"${z_manifest_stderr}"; then
122	    buc_warn "Tripwire image already inscribed: ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}"
123	    buc_info "RBRD is depot-time-immutable. To refresh the tripwire, the depot"
124	    buc_info "must be unmade and relevied:"
125	    buc_info "  rbw-dU \$(rbw-dl)        # unmake the depot"
126	    buc_info "  rbw-dL                  # relevy with new rbrd.env"
127	    buc_die "Cannot inscribe over existing tripwire (would mask drift)"
128	  fi
129	
130	  buc_log_args "Build FROM-scratch image carrying .rbk/rbrd.env"
131	  mkdir -p "${z_build_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create build dir ${z_build_dir}"
132	
133	  cp "${RBBC_rbrd_file}" "${z_rbrd_copy}" \
134	    || buc_die "Failed to copy ${RBBC_rbrd_file} into build context"
135	
136	  printf '%s\n' \
137	    'FROM scratch' \
138	    'COPY rbrd.env /rbrd.env' \
139	    > "${z_dockerfile}" \
140	    || buc_die "Failed to write Dockerfile at ${z_dockerfile}"
141	
142	  docker build -t "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" "${z_build_dir}" \
143	      > "${z_build_stdout}" 2>"${z_build_stderr}" \
144	    || buc_die "docker build failed for ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE} — see ${z_build_stderr}"
145	
146	  buc_log_args "Push tripwire image to GAR"
147	  docker push "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" \
148	      > "${z_push_stdout}" 2>"${z_push_stderr}" \
149	    || buc_die "docker push failed for ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE} — see ${z_push_stderr}"
150	
151	  buc_success "Tripwire inscribed: ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}"
152	}
153	
154	# Check local .rbk/rbrd.env against the inscribed tripwire image
155	# before submitting cloud work. Exact-byte mismatch, missing image,
156	# or registry/auth failure all fatal with recovery guidance.
157	# Token sources mirror rbrd_inscribe: positional $1 then BUZ_FOLIO.
158	rbrd_check() {
159	  zrbndb_sentinel
160	
161	  buc_doc_brief "Check local rbrd.env against inscribed tripwire image (drift detector)"
162	  buc_doc_param "bearer_token" "OAuth access token with GAR read (any role: Payor, Director, Retriever)"
163	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
164	
165	  local -r z_token="${1:-${BUZ_FOLIO:-}}"
166	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbrd_check: bearer token required (positional arg or BUZ_FOLIO)"
167	
168	  local -r z_login_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}login_stderr.txt"
169	  local -r z_manifest_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}manifest_stderr.txt"
170	  local -r z_pull_stdout="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}pull_stdout.txt"
171	  local -r z_pull_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}pull_stderr.txt"
172	  local -r z_create_stdout="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}create_stdout.txt"
173	  local -r z_create_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}create_stderr.txt"
174	  local -r z_cp_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}cp_stderr.txt"
175	  local -r z_rm_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}rm_stderr.txt"
176	  local -r z_inscribed_file="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}rbrd.env.inscribed"
177	  local -r z_diff_file="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}diff.txt"
178	  local -r z_diff_stderr="${ZRBNDB_CHECK_PREFIX}diff_stderr.txt"
179	
180	  buc_log_args "Tripwire check against: ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}"
181	
182	  zrbndb_docker_login "${z_token}" "${z_login_stderr}"
183	
184	  buc_log_args "Existence check via docker manifest inspect"
185	  docker manifest inspect "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" > /dev/null 2>"${z_manifest_stderr}" \
186	    || {
187	      buc_warn "Tripwire image absent or unreachable: ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}"
188	      buc_info "Manifest-inspect stderr: ${z_manifest_stderr}"
189	      buc_info "If depot has not been inscribed, or the tripwire was jettisoned,"
190	      buc_info "re-levy the depot to mint the tripwire:"
191	      buc_info "  rbw-dU \$(rbw-dl)        # unmake (if a stale depot exists)"
192	      buc_info "  rbw-dL                  # levy + inscribe tripwire"
193	      buc_die "Cannot proceed without tripwire — depot regime drift cannot be detected"
194	    }
195	
196	  buc_log_args "Pull tripwire image"
197	  docker pull "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" \
198	      > "${z_pull_stdout}" 2>"${z_pull_stderr}" \
199	    || buc_die "docker pull failed for ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE} — see ${z_pull_stderr}"
200	
201	  buc_log_args "Create temp container to extract /rbrd.env"
202	  docker create "${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE}" \
203	      > "${z_create_stdout}" 2>"${z_create_stderr}" \
204	    || buc_die "docker create failed for ${ZRBNDB_TRIPWIRE_IMAGE} — see ${z_create_stderr}"
205	
206	  local -r z_cid=$(<"${z_create_stdout}")
207	  test -n "${z_cid}" || buc_die "docker create returned empty container ID — see ${z_create_stdout}"
208	
209	  docker cp "${z_cid}:/rbrd.env" "${z_inscribed_file}" 2>"${z_cp_stderr}" \
210	    || {
211	      docker rm "${z_cid}" > /dev/null 2>"${z_rm_stderr}" \
212	        || buc_warn "Failed to remove temp container ${z_cid} — see ${z_rm_stderr}"
213	      buc_die "docker cp failed extracting /rbrd.env from tripwire image — see ${z_cp_stderr}"
214	    }
215	
216	  docker rm "${z_cid}" > /dev/null 2>"${z_rm_stderr}" \
217	    || buc_warn "Failed to remove temp container ${z_cid} — see ${z_rm_stderr}"
218	
219	  # cmp is authoritative for byte-match; diff is for human display on mismatch.
220	  # diff exits 1 when differences exist — expected since cmp already detected
221	  # them. Exit ≥ 2 is a real diff error; capture explicit status and fatal.
222	  if ! cmp -s "${z_inscribed_file}" "${RBBC_rbrd_file}"; then
223	    local z_diff_status=0
224	    diff -u "${z_inscribed_file}" "${RBBC_rbrd_file}" \
225	        > "${z_diff_file}" 2>"${z_diff_stderr}" \
226	      || z_diff_status=$?
227	    test "${z_diff_status}" -le 1 \
228	      || buc_die "diff failed (status ${z_diff_status}) generating drift report — see ${z_diff_stderr}"
229	    buc_warn "RBRD drift detected"
230	    buc_info "Local ${RBBC_rbrd_file} differs from the depot-inscribed copy."
231	    buc_info "Full diff (inscribed → local) at: ${z_diff_file}"
232	    buc_info "Recovery options:"
233	    buc_info "  (a) Restore .rbk/rbrd.env to match the inscribed copy (preserves depot)."
234	    buc_info "  (b) Unmake and re-levy the depot if rbrd.env genuinely needs to change:"
235	    buc_info "        rbw-dU \$(rbw-dl)"
236	    buc_info "        rbw-dL"
237	    buc_die "Refusing to submit cloud work against drifted depot regime"
238	  fi
239	
240	  buc_log_args "Tripwire match — depot regime aligned"
241	}

75	rbra_list() {

77	  buc_doc_shown || return 0

79	  zrbrr_sentinel

82	  local z_roles=("governor" "retriever" "director")
83	  local z_vars=("RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE" "RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE" "RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE")

85	  local z_i

87	    local z_role="${z_roles[$z_i]}"

119	  zburd_enforce
120	  zbupr_kindle
121	  zrbcc_kindle

39	
40	  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"

68	      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
69	      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"

152	zrbrn_furnish() {

21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBRN_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBRN_SOURCED=1

27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbrn_*)
29	
30	zrbrn_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn already kindled"
32	
33	  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
34	  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.
35	
36	  # Enroll all RBRN variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering
37	
38	  buv_regime_enroll RBRN
39	
40	  buv_group_enroll "Core Service Identity"
41	  buv_xname_enroll   RBRN_MONIKER                 2   12  "Unique identifier for Crucible"
42	  buv_string_enroll  RBRN_DESCRIPTION              0  120  "Human-readable description"
43	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_RUNTIME                              "Container runtime: docker or podman" \
44	                     docker podman
45	
46	  buv_group_enroll "Container Image Configuration"
47	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
48	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
49	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Sentry Image"
50	  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_HALLMARK      1  128  "Hallmark tag for Bottle Image"
51	
52	  buv_group_enroll "Service Readiness"
53	  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_BOTTLE_READINESS_DELAY_SEC  0  300  "Seconds to wait after compose-up for bottle services to become ready (0 = no wait)"
54	
55	  buv_group_enroll "Entry Service Configuration"
56	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE                           "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled" \
57	                     disabled enabled
58	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled
59	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION               "External port on Transit Network"
60	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE                   "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"
61	
62	  buv_group_enroll "Enclave Network Configuration"
63	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP                      "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
64	  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK          8   30  "Network mask width (8-30)"
65	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP                    "IP address for Sentry Container"
66	  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP                    "IP address for Bottle Container"
67	
68	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Core"
69	  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN                      "Minimum port for outbound connections"
70	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE                      "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
71	                     disabled global allowlist
72	  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE                   "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
73	                     disabled global allowlist
74	
75	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink DNS Allowlist"
76	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE  allowlist
77	  buv_list_domain_enroll RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS           "Allowed DNS domains"
78	
79	  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Access Allowlist"
80	  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE  allowlist
81	  buv_list_cidr_enroll   RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS             "Allowed CIDR ranges"
82	
83	  # Guard against unexpected RBRN_ variables not in enrollment
84	  buv_scope_sentinel RBRN RBRN_
85	
86	  # Lock all enrolled RBRN_ variables against mutation
87	  buv_lock RBRN
88	
89	  readonly ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
90	}
91	
92	zrbrn_sentinel() {
93	  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
94	}
95	
96	# Enforce all RBRN enrollment validations and custom format checks
97	zrbrn_enforce() {
98	  zrbrn_sentinel
99	
100	  buv_vet RBRN
101	
102	  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
103	  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
104	  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
105	
106	  # Cross-port check (entry ports must be less than uplink port min)
107	  if test "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" = "enabled"; then
108	    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
109	      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
110	    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
111	      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
112	  fi
113	
114	  # Build docker env args array from validated values
115	  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
116	  buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
117	}
118	
119	######################################################################
120	# Public Functions (rbrn_*)
121	
122	# List available nameplate monikers as space-separated tokens
123	# Prerequisite: RBCC sourced (needs RBBC_dot_dir, RBCC_rbrn_file)
124	rbrn_list_capture() {
125	  zrbcc_sentinel
126	
127	  local z_result=""
128	  local z_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
129	  local z_i=""
130	  for z_i in "${!z_files[@]}"; do
131	    test -f "${z_files[$z_i]}" || continue
132	    local z_dir="${z_files[$z_i]%/*}"
133	    local z_moniker="${z_dir##*/}"
134	    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_moniker}"
135	  done
136	  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
137	  echo "${z_result}"
138	}
139	
140	######################################################################
141	# Cross-Nameplate Functions
142	#
143	# rbrn_preflight:  Requires RBCC kindled (called from CLI rbrn_audit)
144	
145	# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
146	zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
147	  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
148	  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
149	  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
150	}
151	
152	# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
153	# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
154	zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
155	  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
156	  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
157	  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
158	  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
159	  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
160	    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
161	  fi
162	}
163	
164	# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
165	# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
166	rbrn_preflight() {
167	  zrbcc_sentinel
168	
169	  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via isolation subshells
170	  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/"*"/${RBCC_rbrn_file}")
171	  local z_data_lines=()
172	  local z_nf_i=""
173	  for z_nf_i in "${!z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
174	    test -f "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}" || continue
175	    local z_line
176	    z_line=$(
177	      bash -c '
178	        source "$1" || exit 1
179	        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
180	      ' _ "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
181	    ) || buc_die "Preflight isolation failed for: ${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
182	    z_data_lines+=("${z_line}")
183	  done
184	
185	  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
186	  local z_ws_port_keys=()
187	  local z_ws_port_vals=()
188	  local z_enc_port_keys=()
189	  local z_enc_port_vals=()
190	  local z_ip_keys=()
191	  local z_ip_vals=()
192	  local z_net_starts=()
193	  local z_net_ends=()
194	  local z_net_owners=()
195	
196	  local z_mon=""
197	  local z_entry=""
198	  local z_ws=""
199	  local z_enc=""
200	  local z_base=""

2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.

12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# RBTE Engine - Theurge test engine implementation module
20	#
21	# BCG module providing kindle/sentinel/public functions for theurge
22	# Rust build, test, and orchestration commands.
23	
24	set -euo pipefail
25	
26	# Multiple inclusion guard
27	test -z "${ZRBTE_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
28	ZRBTE_SOURCED=1
29	
30	######################################################################
31	# Kindle
32	
33	zrbte_kindle() {
34	  test -z "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbte already kindled"
35	
36	  local z_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
37	
38	  readonly RBTE_MANIFEST="${z_dir}/Cargo.toml"
39	  readonly ZRBTE_BINARY="${z_dir}/target/debug/rbtd"
40	
41	  # Theurge-own colophons (routed by rbte_dispatch, not the RBK zipper)
42	  readonly ZRBTE_COLOPHONS="rbtd-ap"
43	
44	  # Combined manifest: RBK zipper colophons + theurge-own colophons
45	  readonly ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST="${ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST} ${ZRBTE_COLOPHONS}"
46	
47	  # Suite-to-fixture mappings
48	  ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST=(
49	    "enrollment-validation"
50	    "regime-validation"
51	    "regime-smoke"
52	    "handbook-render"
53	    "dockerfile-hygiene"
54	  )
55	  ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "hallmark-lifecycle" "batch-vouch")
56	  ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")
57	  ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "hallmark-lifecycle" "batch-vouch" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")
58	  # Gauntlet — release-qualification ladder, walks marshal-zero state through
59	  # canonical-credentialed state to crucible verification. Pristine-lifecycle
60	  # case 1 is the entry-contract gate; preceding enrollment-validation runs
61	  # state-indifferent and is harmless on broken state. Fail-fast across
62	  # fixtures is provided by the for-loop's set -e.
63	  ZRBTE_SUITE_GAUNTLET=(
64	    "enrollment-validation"
65	    "pristine-lifecycle"
66	    "canonical-establish"
67	    "onboarding-sequence"
68	    "regime-validation"
69	    "regime-smoke"
70	    "dockerfile-hygiene"
71	    "hallmark-lifecycle"
72	    "tadmor"
73	    "moriah"
74	    "srjcl"
75	    "pluml"
76	  )
77	
78	  readonly ZRBTE_KINDLED=1
79	}
80	
81	######################################################################
82	# Sentinel
83	
84	zrbte_sentinel() {
85	  test "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbte not kindled - call zrbte_kindle first"
86	}
87	
88	######################################################################
89	# Internal helpers
90	
91	zrbte_build_binary() {
92	  zrbte_sentinel
93	
94	  buc_step "Building theurge"
95	  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
96	  test -x "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" || buc_die "Theurge binary not found: ${ZRBTE_BINARY}"
97	}
98	
99	zrbte_resolve_suite() {
100	  local z_suite="$1"
101	  case "${z_suite}" in
102	    fast)     echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[*]}" ;;
103	    service)  echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE[*]}" ;;
104	    crucible) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE[*]}" ;;
105	    complete) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE[*]}" ;;
106	    gauntlet) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_GAUNTLET[*]}" ;;
107	    *)        buc_die "Unknown suite: ${z_suite} (expected fast|service|crucible|complete|gauntlet)" ;;
108	  esac
109	}
110	
111	######################################################################
112	# Public functions
113	
114	rbte_build() {
115	  zrbte_sentinel
116	
117	  buc_step "Building theurge"
118	  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
119	  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
120	  buc_success "Theurge built"
121	}
122	
123	rbte_test() {
124	  zrbte_sentinel
125	
126	  buc_step "Testing theurge"
127	  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
128	  cargo test --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo test failed"
129	  buc_success "All theurge tests passed"
130	}
131	
132	rbte_run() {
133	  zrbte_sentinel
134	
135	  local z_fixture="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
136	  test -n "${z_fixture}" || buc_die "No fixture imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-r.FixtureRun.tadmor.sh)"
137	
138	  zrbte_build_binary
139	
140	  buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
141	  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
142	}
143	
144	rbte_suite() {
145	  zrbte_sentinel
146	
147	  local z_suite="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
148	  test -n "${z_suite}" || buc_die "No suite imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh)"
149	
150	  local z_fixture_list
151	  z_fixture_list="$(zrbte_resolve_suite "${z_suite}")"
152	
153	  zrbte_build_binary
154	
155	  local z_count=0
156	  local z_fixture
157	  for z_fixture in ${z_fixture_list}; do
158	    buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
159	    "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
160	    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
161	  done
162	
163	  buc_success "Suite '${z_suite}' complete (${z_count} fixtures)"
164	}
165	
166	rbte_single() {
167	  zrbte_sentinel
168	
169	  zrbte_build_binary
170	
171	  local z_fixture="${1:-}"
172	  local z_case="${2:-}"
173	  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" single "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" ${z_fixture:+"${z_fixture}"} ${z_case:+"${z_case}"}
174	}
175	
176	rbte_probe() {
177	  zrbte_sentinel
178	
179	  local -r z_role="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
180	  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "No role imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-ap.AccessProbe.governor.sh)"
181	
182	  case "${z_role}" in
183	    governor|director|retriever)
184	      # JWT SA propagation-absorbing budget: 60 attempts × 3000ms ≈ 180s worst case.
185	      # Happy path exits on first 2xx; budget consumed only when post-mint IAM
186	      # propagation lags. Each retry mints a fresh JWT-OAuth token, so the inner
187	      # rbgo_get_token_capture race (BBAAp) is exercised independently per attempt.
188	      local -r z_iterations=60
189	      local -r z_delay_ms=3000
190	      buc_step "JWT SA access probe: ${z_role}"
191	      rbgv_jwt_sa_probe "${z_role}" "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
192	      buc_success "${z_role} JWT access probe passed"
193	      ;;
194	    payor)
195	      # Payor probe semantic unchanged: stability-sample loop.
196	      local -r z_iterations=5
197	      local -r z_delay_ms=1500
198	      buc_step "Payor OAuth access probe"
199	      source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
200	      zrbrp_kindle
201	      zrbrp_enforce
202	      rbgv_payor_oauth_probe "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
203	      buc_success "Payor OAuth access probe passed"
204	      ;;
205	    *)
206	      buc_die "Unknown access-probe role: ${z_role} (expected governor|director|retriever|payor)"
207	      ;;
208	  esac
209	}

26	# rbho walkthroughs do not require rbho-local state (they probe the

30	zrbho_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBHO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbho already kindled"
32	  zrbgc_sentinel

34	  zrbz_sentinel
35

37	  # BURD_TEMP_DIR is dispatcher-provided (rbho is thin furnish — does not kindle burd).
38	  readonly ZRBHO_DOCKER_IMAGES_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbho_docker_images_"
39	  readonly ZRBHO_DOCKER_PS_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbho_docker_ps_"
40	  readonly ZRBHO_DOCKER_STDERR_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbho_docker_stderr_"
41	
42	  # Handbook track display names — plain strings, not linked-term yelps.
43	  # Used where tracks cross-reference each other and in the start-here menu.
44	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_CRASH_COURSE="Crash Course"
45	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_RET_CREDS="Install Retriever Credentials"
46	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_DIR_CREDS="Install Director Credentials"
47	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_CRUCIBLE="Your First Crucible"
48	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_TADMOR="Tadmor Security"
49	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_FIRST_BUILD="Your First Cloud Build"
50	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_AIRGAP="Airgap Cloud Build"
51	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_BIND="Bind Cloud Build"
52	  readonly RBHO_TRACK_GRAFT="Graft Cloud Build"

54	  readonly ZRBHO_KINDLED=1
55	}
56	
57	zrbho_sentinel() {
58	  test "${ZRBHO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbho not kindled - call zrbho_kindle first"
59	}
60	
61	# Probe utilities — no sentinels, all work pre-kindle. Filesystem probes
62	# for onboarding status; callers declare caller-scope variables locally.
63	
64	zrbho_po_status() {
65	  local -r z_flag="${1:-}"
66	  local -r z_text="${2:-}"
67	  if test "${z_flag}" = "1"; then
68	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_YES}${z_text}"
69	  else
70	    buh_line "${RBYC_PROBE_NO}${z_text}"
71	  fi
72	}
73	
74	# Extract a KEY=VALUE from a file; stdout empty if missing.  No sourcing.
75	zrbho_po_extract_capture() {
76	  local -r z_file="${1:-}"
77	  local -r z_key="${2:-}"
78	  test -n "${z_key}"  || return 1
79	  test -f "${z_file}" || return 1
80	  local z_line=""
81	  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
82	    case "${z_line}" in "${z_key}="*) echo "${z_line#"${z_key}="}"; return 0 ;; esac
83	  done < "${z_file}"
84	  return 1
85	}

87	zrbho_credential_install() {
88	  local -r z_role_constant="${1}"
89	
90	  local z_secrets_dir=""
91	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
92	    z_secrets_dir=$(zrbho_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_SECRETS_DIR") || z_secrets_dir=""
93	  fi

95	  local z_cred_present=0
96	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" \
97	     && test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${z_role_constant}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
98	    z_cred_present=1
99	  fi

16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	# Tinder constants (pure string literals, no variable expansion — available at source time)
29	# Depot project ID infix between RBRD_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRD_DEPOT_MONIKER, consumed
30	# by rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh's RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID derivation.
31	RBGC_depot_project_infix="d-"
32	
33	######################################################################
34	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
35	
36	zrbgc_kindle() {
37	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
38	
39	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
40	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
41	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
44	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
45	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
46	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
47	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
48	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
49	
50	  # Global resource validation patterns
51	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
52	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
53	
54	  # Basic Configuration
55	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
56	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
57	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
58	
59	  # Timeouts
60	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
61	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
62	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
63	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
64	
65	  # JWT-bearer consumer-side retry — every RBRA consumer absorbs the post-write
66	  # race where Google's OAuth backend has not yet accepted a freshly-minted SA
67	  # or its key, surfaced as `invalid_grant` paired with either
68	  # `Invalid JWT Signature.` (fresh-key lag) or `Invalid grant: account not
69	  # found` (fresh-SA lag). 90s budget locked by ₣BB pristine-tier contract;
70	  # cadence below.
71	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_BUDGET_SEC=90
72	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=2
73	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC=15
74	
75	  # IAM-grant propagation retry — exponential-backoff budget shared by every
76	  # get-modify-set IAM grant site in rbgi_IAM.sh plus the inline GAR retry in
77	  # rbgg_invest_director. Recognizes three propagation classes against the
78	  # same time budget: (A) forward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "does not
79	  # exist"), (B) backward member-visibility (HTTP 400 "is not deleted"),
80	  # (C) caller-recently-empowered (HTTP 403 from resource-scope IAM caches).
81	  # Class C is time-bounded only — real propagation succeeds within budget,
82	  # real denial waits the budget and fails cleanly. RBSCIP locks the profile.
83	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC=3
84	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC=20
85	  readonly RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC=420
86	
87	  # HTTP transient-failure retry — bounded retry on curl-network blips
88	  # (connection refused 7, timeout 28, TLS handshake 35, recv failure 56).
89	  # Shared by rbgu_http_json and the OAuth token-mint POST. Other curl exits
90	  # are configuration-deterministic and fail fast.
91	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS=3
92	  readonly RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC=3
93	
94	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
95	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
96	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_AUTHORIZE_URL="https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"
97	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_USERINFO_URL="https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo"
98	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
99	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
100	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
101	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
102	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
103	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
104	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
105	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
106	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
107	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
108	
109	  # OAuth Scopes
110	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
111	
112	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
113	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
114	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
115	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
116	
117	  # Email/Domain Assembly
118	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
119	
120	  # API Version Paths
121	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
122	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
123	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
124	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
125	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
126	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
127	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
128	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
129	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
130	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
131	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
132	
133	  # REST Path Fragments
134	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
135	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
136	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
137	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
138	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
139	
140	  # REST Operation Suffixes
141	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
142	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
143	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
144	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
145	
146	  # Operation Prefixes
147	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
148	
149	  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
150	  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under rbi_hm/<hallmark>/.
151	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
152	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
153	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
154	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
155	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
156	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"
157	
158	  # Hallmark Prefix Letters
159	  # Encode artifact provenance in the leading character of a hallmark stamp.
160	  # Kludge hallmarks are local-only; the other three originate in GAR.
161	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_CONJURE="c"
162	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_KLUDGE="k"
163	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_BIND="b"
164	  readonly RBGC_HALLMARK_PREFIX_GRAFT="g"
165	
166	  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
167	  # Top-level namespaces under which arks are stored. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
168	  # The hm/rq/es siblings hold Director-authored image families; rbi_df holds
169	  # Payor-authored depot-scoped OCI artifacts produced during depot lifetime.
170	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="rbi_hm"
171	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="rbi_rq"
172	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="rbi_es"
173	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_DEPOT_FACTS="rbi_df"
174	
175	  # rbi_df layout: flat namespace. No subdirs. Each filename names one
176	  # depot-scoped artifact; tag varies by artifact role.
177	  #
178	  # Current artifacts:
179	  #   probe-tether:probe   — tether pool levy-time capability probe
180	  #                          (cloud-pushed marker image, FROM scratch)
181	  #   probe-airgap:probe   — airgap pool levy-time capability probe
182	  #                          (cloud-pushed marker image, FROM scratch)
183	  #   rbrd:tripwire        — depot regime tripwire (FROM-scratch image
184	  #                          carrying .rbk/rbrd.env). Host-inscribed by
185	  #                          Payor at end of levy; pulled + byte-diffed
186	  #                          by every cloud-submitting command. See
187	  #                          Tools/rbk/rbndb_base.sh.
